description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant featuring a cylindrical, light beige pot with a smooth, matte finish. The pot is filled with dark soil from which several upright, slender stems emerge, each supporting broad, oval-shaped green leaves with visible veins. The stems are a warm, yellowish-brown color, contrasting with the lush green foliage. The plant appears healthy and well-maintained, with leaves arranged in a natural, slightly asymmetrical pattern. The pot itself is plain and unadorned, with a subtle horizontal banding texture. This type of potted plant is commonly used to add greenery and a touch of nature to urban environments such as sidewalks, building entrances, or patios.
description: A medium-sized potted plant with broad green leaves and upright stems in a plain, light beige cylindrical pot filled with dark soil.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plant's broad leaves and two main upright stems emerging from a smooth, light beige pot.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the dense cluster of leaves and the pot's subtle horizontal banding, with the soil surface clearly visible.
description_view_2: A side view revealing the plant's asymmetrical leaf arrangement and the full width of the cylindrical pot.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back stems and leaves, with the pot's plain surface and soil exposed.
